info.title: BotJao API
info.description: API for BotJao chatbot platform - manage bots, flows, knowledge bases, and conversations

get.description: Returns paginated list of bots accessible by the authenticated user. Owners see their owned bots, Admins see assigned bots.

post.description: Creates a new bot with auto-generated webhook URL and Base Flow. For Telegram bots, webhook is automatically configured.

channel_access_token.description: Channel access token for the messaging platform

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific bot including settings and default flow.

put.description: Updates bot information. For Telegram bots, changing the token will re-configure the webhook.

get.description: Returns the channel access token and secret. Owner only - admins cannot access credentials.

403.description: Forbidden - only owners can view credentials

get.description: Returns all configuration settings for a bot. Creates default settings if none exist.

put.description: Updates configuration settings for a bot including usage limits, HITL, response hours, and more.

get.summary: List all flows for a bot
get.description: Returns paginated list of flows for a specific bot. Base/default flow is always listed first.

post.description: Creates a new flow for a bot. If it's the first flow or marked as default, it becomes the default flow.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific flow including knowledge bases.

put.description: Updates flow configuration. Setting is_default=true will unset other flows as default.

post.description: Sets this flow as the default flow for the bot. The previous default flow will be unset.

credentials_visible.description: True if current user is owner

FlowList.description: Slim flow resource for list endpoints (excludes system_prompt, enabled_tools)

response_hours.description: Business hours per day of week

tags.name: Flows
tags.description: Flow management endpoints for bot conversation configuration
